title: Motivation Monday: Believe
excerpt: I had a very lovely and relaxing weekend, though I didn’t get done a fraction of what I wanted to. That is why I thought it would be a good time for a Motivation Monday quote! This one comes from T. Roosevelt.
content:
I had a very lovely and relaxing weekend, though I didn’t get done a fraction of what I wanted to. That is why I thought it would be a good time for a Motivation Monday quote! This one comes from T. Roosevelt.

“Believe you can & you’re halfway there.”

The photo behind the quote is one I took yesterday when I was visiting

Shofuso Japanese Gardens

. You may have already seen the original on

Instagram

, but I thought it was a pretty great pic to use for this quote! What do you think? I can’t wait to go back again in the Fall when some of the trees are changing. I’ll be sure to bring my fancy camera with me on that trip!

Hope you have a great Monday! Share any motivational quotes you like below!

featuredImage.alt: Motivation Monday: Believe on Katie Crafts; http://www.katiecrafts.com
